title: Emergency plan one-page household summary
summary: Fit contacts, meeting points, evacuation triggers, medical needs, pets, utility shutoff boundaries, document location, and three priority actions on one page.
content: Fit contacts, meeting points, evacuation triggers, medical needs, pets, utility shutoff boundaries, document location, and three priority actions on one page. Give every member a paper copy and rehearse how it changes for fire, earthquake, flood, heat, and outage. Do not bury the first actions inside a long manual that no one can open under stress.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Emergency plan one-page household summary”.
Pencil. Context: “Emergency plan one-page household summary”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Emergency plan one-page household summary»
steps: Fit contacts, meeting points, evacuation triggers, medical needs, pets, utility shutoff boundaries, document location, and three priority actions on one page.
Give every member a paper copy and rehearse how it changes for fire, earthquake, flood, heat, and outage.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
warnings: Do not bury the first actions inside a long manual that no one can open under stress.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Emergency plan one-page household summary.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Emergency plan one-page household summary.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Emergency plan one-page household summary.
short_term: For Emergency plan one-page household summary, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Emergency plan one-page household summary, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Emergency plan one-page household summary, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Emergency plan one-page household summary to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
sources: CDC — Water, sanitation and hygiene emergencies: https://www.cdc.gov/water-emergency/index.html
